tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: With only ten percent left and no other deadlines looming, I can finish this quickly without rushing. The pressure to submit perfectly is low, so I'll just knock it out now.
I just missed the deadline by seconds, and my stress spiked because I assumed I had time. This impulsive confidence is costing me points.
I'm at 99% done with minimal time left, but my stress is spiking. I need to finish this last bit now before I risk another rushed mistake.
My impulsive overconfidence nearly cost me again; assuming the clock was on my side blinded me to the real deadline. I need to stop trusting gut feelings and check timestamps immediately.

desires: Submit this assignment immediately to secure the grade and stop feeling like a fool for missing the deadline twice today.
Prove to myself that I can finish a hard task perfectly under pressure without relying on risky gut feelings about time.
Get this out of my head so I don't have to worry about looking unreliable to the professor or my team anymore.

goals.description: Submit the assignment NOW. It's 98.7% done and past the deadline, so I'm going to hit 'submit' anyway just to stop this anxiety loop and prove I can control the outcome, even if it means taking a penalty for missing the window.
goals.rationale: My achievement drive is screaming that a zero or late submission is catastrophic for my credibility. Since I missed the actual deadline, the immediate consequence is already locked in; now I need to act impulsively to close the loop on this stress before it paralyzes me further. Procrastination bias is high, but the fear of looking unreliable to the professor overrides the desire to wait.

agent.last_reasoning: I need to finish the last 1.2% instantly to submit and stop this anxiety loop. Waiting kills my credibility; finishing now lets me hit 'submit' despite the penalty. I'll skip sleep for now, but if I ignore my teammate again, they might feel ignored.

goals.description: Finalize the assignment submission immediately to lock in the grade and prove competence before the deadline hits.
goals.rationale: My achievement drive is maxed out right now; I cannot tolerate the risk of looking unreliable to Professor Assignment. The short planning horizon means I'm only focused on this immediate win, not future tasks.

goals.description: Drop the note tidying task entirely for today; it's a waste of energy when I need to reclaim my mental state after this sprint.
goals.rationale: I'm impulsive and risk-tolerant regarding time management. If it's not due Friday at midnight, doing it now is inefficient and drains the focus I need to finish the high-stakes assignment.

desires: Submit this assignment by 13:30 to secure the grade and validate my competence before the day ends.

Avoid looking incompetent or unreliable to Professor Assignment; I need their approval right now.
